lines.english: He gathers up that which brings corruption;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਛੋਡਿ ਚਲਿਆ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਗਵਾਰ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: se chhodd chaliaa khin meh gavaar |5|
lines.english: leaving them, the fool must depart in an instant. ||5||
He wanders in attachment to Maya.
He acts in accordance with the karma of his past actions.
God is not affected by virtue or vice. ||6||
Only the Creator Himself remains detached.
Without You, I have no other place of rest.
I seek Your Sanctuary, O Perfect Compassionate Lord.
Please save me, O Merciful Lord of the Universe!
Please take pity on me, God, and bless me with Your Name. ||7||
Please be merciful, and attach me to the hem of Your robe.
You are High and Exalted, and You are totally Infinite.
You are the Creator, and You are the Doer.
Slave Nanak has entered the Sanctuary of God. ||8||2||
Basant Kee Vaar, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਕੈ ਹੋਹੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: har kaa naam dhiaae kai hohu hariaa bhaaee |
lines.english: Meditate on the Lord's Name, and blossom forth in green abundance.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮਿ ਲਿਖੰਤੈ ਪਾਈਐ ਇਹ ਰੁਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: karam likhantai paaeeai ih rut suhaaee |
lines.english: By your high destiny, you have been blessed with this wondrous spring of the soul.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਣੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣੁ ਮਉਲਿਆ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: van trin tribhavan mauliaa amrit fal paaee |
lines.english: See all the three worlds in bloom, and obtain the Fruit of Ambrosial Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਿਮਰੈ ਏਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਧਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak simarai ek naam fir bahurr na dhaaee |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, remember in meditation the One Name, and you shall never again be consigned to the womb of reincarnation.. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਲਥੀ ਸਭ ਛਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: mil saadhoo sukh aoopajai lathee sabh chhaaee |
lines.english: Meeting with the Holy Saints, peace wells up, and all sins are erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਣੇ ਚਰਣ ਜਪਾਇਅਨੁ ਵਿਚਿ ਦਯੁ ਖੜੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapane charan japaaeian vich day kharroaa |
lines.english: The Lord Himself leads us to dwell at His Feet. He stands right in our midst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਜੇ ਬਧੇ ਮਹਾਬਲੀ ਕਰਿ ਸਚਾ ਢੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: panje badhe mahaabalee kar sachaa dtoaa |
lines.english: The five powerful desires are bound down, when you lean on the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੋਗ ਸੋਗ ਸਭਿ ਮਿਟਿ ਗਏ ਨਿਤ ਨਵਾ ਨਿਰੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: rog sog sabh mitt ge nit navaa niroaa |
lines.english: All sorrows and sicknesses are eradicated, and you become ever-fresh and rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇਦਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਾਇ ਨ ਮੋਆ ॥
lines.translit: din rain naam dhiaaeidaa fir paae na moaa |
lines.english: Night and day, meditate on the Naam, the Name of the Lord. You shall never again die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਖਸਮ ਕੇ ਕਉਣੁ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh khasam ke kaun keemat paavai |
lines.english: All creatures belong to God, our Lord and Master. Who can place a value on Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਥਹੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਕਹ ਰਹੈ ਕਹ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kithahu upajai keh rahai keh maeh samaavai |
lines.english: Where do we come from? Where do we live? Where do we go in the end?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਤੇ ਉਪਜਿਆ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਸੋਈ ਫਿਰਿ ਹੋਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis te upajiaa naanakaa soee fir hoaa |2|
lines.english: And the One, from whom we came, O Nanak, into Him we merge once again. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਮੁ ਅਗੋਚਰੁ ਸਾਹਿਬੋ ਦੂਸਰੁ ਲਵੈ ਨ ਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: agam agochar saahibo doosar lavai na laavai |
lines.english: The Lord God is Inaccessible and Unfathomable; there is no other equal to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹਨਿ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਸੁਣਨਿ ਨਿਤ ਸੇ ਭਗਤ ਸੁਹਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kehan dhiaaein sunan nit se bhagat suhaavai |
lines.english: Those who meditate, listen and chant, those devotees are blessed and beautified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਉਪਦੇਸਿਆ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸੁਣਾਵੈ ॥੩॥੧॥
lines.translit: sach poorai gur upadesiaa naanak sunaavai |3|1|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has taught this Truth. Nanak proclaims it to the world. ||3||1||
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਬਾਣੀ ਭਗਤਾਂ ਕੀ ॥ ਕਬੀਰ ਜੀ ਘਰੁ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: basant baanee bhagataan kee | kabeer jee ghar 1 |
lines.english: Basant, The Word Of The Devotees, Kabeer Jee, First House:
The earth is in bloom, and the sky is in bloom.
Each and every heart has blossomed forth, and the soul is illumined. ||1||
My Sovereign Lord King blossoms forth in countless ways.
The Simritees blossom forth, along with the Koran and the Bible. ||2||
The four Vedas blossom forth in duality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਹ ਦੇਖਉ ਤਹ ਰਹਿਆ ਸਮਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jeh dekhau teh rahiaa samaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Wherever I look, I see Him there pervading. ||1||Pause||
Shiva blossoms forth in Yoga and meditation.
The Pandits, the Hindu religious scholars, are intoxicated, reading the Puraanas.
Kabeer's Lord and Master pervades in all alike. ||3||1||
The penitents are intoxicated with the mystery of penance. ||1||
The Sannyaasees are intoxicated in egotism.
The Yogis are intoxicated in Yoga and meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਗ ਹੀ ਚੋਰ ਘਰੁ ਮੁਸਨ ਲਾਗ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sang hee chor ghar musan laag |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The thieves are with them, plundering their homes. ||1||Pause||
Suk Dayv and Akrur are awake and aware.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਮਦ ਮਾਤੇ ਕੋਊ ਨ ਜਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: sabh mad maate koaoo na jaag |
lines.english: All are intoxicated with the wine of Maya; no one is awake and aware.
